source.paper: A Unified Newton Barrier Method for Multibody Dynamics
source.phase: Phase 6: CPU Scene Corpus And Py-Demos

classification_policy.gate: Rows move only when artifact, command, invariant, evidence path or PR, and limitation status are explicit.
classification_policy.visual_policy: Py-demo rows require headless smoke plus long-horizon capture commands before landing.
classification_policy.benchmark_policy: Performance rows require CPU benchmark/profile packet paths before landing.

scenes.expected_invariant: Mixed rigid, deformable, rod, cloth, and articulated bodies remain finite and intersection-free at the paper timestep.
scenes.limitation_status: Launchable placeholder only; waiting for runtime mixed-domain stepping and paper-scale assets.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Placeholder py-demo records commands but does not claim reproduction.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced bridge boards, point connections, and traveler stay finite while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced runtime smoke and CPU packet only; waiting for rod, rigid, and codimensional paper-scale coupling.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced hanging-bridge scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-hanging-bridge-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Full paper body/node/contact counts remain planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Pulley constraints satisfy residual tolerances and force-vs-mass comparison rows.
scenes.limitation_status: Launchable placeholder only; waiting for sparse equality-constraint runtime solve.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Force comparison remains planned until the runtime packet exists.

scenes.expected_invariant: Umbrella cloth, rod skeleton, hinge, sliding, and point-connection rows stay finite.
scenes.limitation_status: Launchable placeholder only; waiting for cloth/rod coupling and runtime sliding constraints.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Visual evidence command is explicit; no paper-scale capture is claimed.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced vehicle chassis, passive wheel hinges, and flat terrain contact stay finite and non-penetrating through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced chassis/passive-wheel terrain smoke and CPU packet only; terrain mesh, navigation controls, and Table 2 timing remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced terrain vehicle scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-terrain-vehicle-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Full 10-body/34k-node paper reproduction remains planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced six-body ragdoll chain, revolute articulation rows, and flat-ground contact stay finite and non-penetrating through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced six-body revolute-chain smoke and CPU packet only; cone-twist joints, 60-ragdoll scale, and Table 2 timing remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced ragdoll scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-ragdoll-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Paper 60-ragdoll cone-twist scale remains planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced single-hinge nunchaku handle stays finite while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced single-hinge runtime smoke and CPU packet only; waiting for cone-twist ranges and N-by-N scaling.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced nunchaku hinge scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-nunchaku-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Full cone-twist and scaling evidence remain planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced windmill hinge and falling-striker contact scene stays finite, non-penetrating, and constrained while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced hinge/contact smoke and CPU packet only; waiting for accepted Bullet/reference baseline packet, cube piles, and paper-scale timing.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced windmill hinge/contact scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-windmill-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Bullet/reference comparison cannot land without a maintained baseline command.

scenes.expected_invariant: Affine, deformable, shell, cloth self-contact, and friction rows remain finite.
scenes.limitation_status: Launchable placeholder only; waiting for ABD runtime stepping and cloth self-contact parity.
scenes.notes_or_gap: ABD primitive/oracle rows exist, but the full scene does not.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced rolling-wheel contact scene stays finite, non-penetrating, and spinning while stepping through the rigid IPC World path.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced rolling-wheel smoke and CPU packet only; angular-velocity sweep, rolling-contact model, and Table 2 timing remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: The py-demo now runs a reduced precession wheel scene through World::step, and bm-plan083-cpu-precession-packet validates the reduced benchmark packet. Paper angular-velocity sweep remains planned.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced CPU packet reports finite wall-time, body, contact, friction, articulation, solver-iteration, and equality-residual counters across the runnable reduced corpus rows.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced aggregate wall-time packet only; paper gradient, Hessian, contact-pair, CCD, linear-solve, CPU/GPU parity, and paper-scale scene timing breakdowns remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-timing-breakdown-packet aggregates the reduced hanging-bridge, nunchaku, terrain vehicle, ragdoll, windmill, and precession runtime rows without claiming the paper Fig. 24 subphase breakdown.

scenes.expected_invariant: N-by-N nunchaku timing grows linearly for N = 20, 40, 60, 80, 100 at matched tolerances.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced independent-hinge scaling packet only; cone-twist ranges, coupled N-by-N contact, and paper-scale linear-growth claims remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Shares the reduced nunchaku scene with Fig. 13; bm-plan083-cpu-nunchaku-scaling-packet validates sizes N = 20, 40, 60, 80, 100 through rigid IPC World::step without claiming paper-scale cone-twist scaling.

scenes.expected_invariant: Reduced Table 2 packet reports finite body, dynamic-body, contact, friction, articulation, solver-iteration, residual, and timing counters for runnable reduced rows.
scenes.limitation_status: Reduced setup/statistics packet only; lying-flat, pulley, umbrella, candy, paper body/node/contact counts, paper timesteps, and paper timing rows remain planned.
scenes.notes_or_gap: bm-plan083-cpu-table2-packet covers reduced hanging bridge, terrain vehicle, ragdoll, windmill, and precession rows through rigid IPC World::step; missing mixed/constraint/ABD scenes stay explicit.

scenes.expected_invariant: Wrecking-ball rigid comparison reports matched accuracy against rigid IPC and ABD packet rows.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for ABD runtime stepping and 14k-triangle asset policy.
scenes.notes_or_gap: No launchable scene until ABD runtime path exists.

scenes.expected_invariant: House-of-cards comparison reports rigid IPC and ABD timings at matched tolerances.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for ABD runtime stepping and card-stack assets.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Benchmark row only for now.

scenes.expected_invariant: 8x8 chain net reports matched rigid IPC and ABD timings.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for ABD runtime stepping and chain-net generator.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Benchmark row only for now.

scenes.expected_invariant: 16x16 chain net reports matched rigid IPC and ABD timings.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for ABD runtime stepping and chain-net generator.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Benchmark row only for now.

scenes.expected_invariant: Large chain-net stress packet reports CPU timing and memory at matched accuracy.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for ABD runtime stepping, asset generator, and accepted stress-machine policy.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Stress benchmark is not a regular py-demo.

scenes.expected_invariant: Gear packet reports CPU timing, contact-force diagnostics, and later GPU parity.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for ABD runtime stepping and Phase 7 GPU parity packet.
scenes.notes_or_gap: CPU row is planned here; GPU speedup belongs to Phase 7.

scenes.expected_invariant: Small Bullet comparison records matched rigid contact accuracy and timing.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for accepted Bullet/reference baseline command.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Benchmark row only for now.

scenes.expected_invariant: Medium Bullet comparison records matched rigid contact accuracy and timing.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for accepted Bullet/reference baseline command.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Benchmark row only for now.

scenes.expected_invariant: Large Bullet comparison records matched rigid contact accuracy and timing.
scenes.limitation_status: Waiting for accepted Bullet/reference baseline command.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Benchmark row only for now.

scenes.expected_invariant: ABD complex-geometry scene reports finite contact energy and runtime residuals.
scenes.limitation_status: Launchable placeholder only; waiting for ABD runtime stepping beyond primitive/oracle rows.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Primitive ABD micro-packet exists, but scene stepping does not.

scenes.expected_invariant: ABD/FEM coupling scene reports finite energy, deterministic restart, and no inversion.
scenes.limitation_status: Launchable placeholder only; waiting for ABD/FEM mixed runtime coupling.
scenes.notes_or_gap: No performance claim until matched scene packet lands.

scenes.expected_invariant: Every ABD demo-suite row has a launchable py-demo placeholder with explicit limitation text.
scenes.limitation_status: Launchable placeholders only; each real scene remains tied to its row-specific benchmark packet.
scenes.notes_or_gap: This aggregate row tracks category coverage, not a separate runtime scene.

scenes.expected_invariant: GPU acceleration is explicitly deferred to Phase 7 private parity and speed packets.
scenes.limitation_status: Not applicable to Phase 6 CPU scene corpus.
scenes.notes_or_gap: Phase 7 owns CPU/GPU parity, transfer timing, kernel timing, and speedup claims.
